RerankOutputDocument.description: Represents a single document returned from a rerank operation, ordered by relevance to the query.

index.description: The zero-based index of the document in the original input list.
index.title: Index

relevance_score.description: The relevance score assigned by the reranker, indicating how relevant the document is to the query. Higher scores indicate greater relevance.
relevance_score.title: Relevance Score

id.description: A unique identifier for the document, matching the id in the input document if provided.
id.title: Id

text.description: The text content of the document, if returned by the reranker.
text.title: Text

RerankOutputDocument.title: RerankOutputDocument

description: Represents the list of output documents returned from a rerank operation, ordered by relevance to the query.
title: RerankOutputDocuments
